questions.question: I ___ play games. (一般動詞・現在・否定)
questions.explanation: 一般動詞の否定文は do not/does not + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: I ___ play games yesterday. (一般動詞・過去・否定)
questions.explanation: 一般動詞の過去形の否定文は did not + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: I ___ play games tomorrow. (一般動詞・未来・否定)
questions.explanation: 未来形の否定文は will not + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: I ___ happy. (be動詞・現在・否定)
questions.explanation: be動詞の否定文は be動詞 + not です

questions.question: I ___ happy yesterday. (be動詞・過去・否定)
questions.explanation: be動詞の否定文は be動詞 + not です

questions.question: She ___ play games. (三人称・現在・否定)
questions.explanation: 三人称単数の否定文は does not + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: I ___ playing games now. (進行形・否定)
questions.explanation: 進行形の否定文は be動詞 + not + -ing です

questions.question: They ___ students. (be動詞・現在・否定)
questions.explanation: 複数形のbe動詞の否定文は are not です
